title: MUGON-113 Without Words Collection 20 The Masseuse I Asked At A Business Hotel Is A Young Woman...
overview: Stimulating at the last minute... A casual temptation When I asked for a massage at the hotel where I was staying, a young woman came. The situation of being alone with a woman on the bed for the first time makes my heart race. The sweet scent that wafts with every move, and the warm and soft feel of your hand through the towel. Her hand gently touches the crotch that has involuntarily swollen.
